title: Lean Proof Verification Requirements
description: Formal mathematics content must have verified Lean 4 proofs with proper sorry tracking.

statements.label: Lean project compiles
statements.requirement: The Lean 4 project SHALL compile with `lake build` without errors.

statements.label: Sorry annotations tracked
statements.requirement: All `sorry` placeholders SHALL be annotated with reference to the corresponding proof obligation.

statements.label: Citations match bibliography
statements.requirement: All citations in LaTeX documents SHALL have corresponding bibliography entries.
